title: 朝日杯FSの後に・楽しんだ横で

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: How did I do? Wasn't it the best I've shown yet?
choice_data_list: You looked like you were having a great time!
You looked like you were having a great time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I don't think I've ever run with my pedal to
the metal like that before!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the fans and the younger students could
feel the excitement!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now it's time to move on to the classic year.
There are even more fun races ahead of us!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And that means we're aiming for the Classic races,
right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the way she ran today, there's no doubt in
my mind that she'll hold her own in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So it makes sense that we next aim for the race
many consider to be their prelude...
choice_data_list: Let's take on the Spring Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so there's an order that you have to follow?
I'm down with that! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, I'm looking forward to seeing what it'll
be like! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
On that note, it looks like I have an interview
now. I'll see you later!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You did a great job! Here, have some water and
relax a bit...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Trainer…

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text:
She's... waaaay faster than the rumors suggested.
She's like... a monster...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after finishing the big run...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky! That last race of yours was
downright amaz'n!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Just watching it got me all worked up! I had to do
a few laps on the track by m'self afterwards!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe, calm down! Take a deep breath.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Inhale... Exhale... Inha—hack, cough!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That really was a great race, Maruzen. You
showed us what we should all be striving for.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. I'm honored to hear you say so. From
here on out, I'm going to keep showing you my
best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to watching and learning even
more from you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there she is! Maruzensky, we'd love to have a
word with you!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Please tell us about your stunning run in the Asahi
Hai!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow, look at all the reporters...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: She really is someone we can look up to.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting, Trainer.
choice_data_list: You must be tired after the interview.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting, Trainer.
choice_data_list: You must be tired after the interview.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and with all this press coverage, I didn't
have time to train today...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I don't like it, but... I really wanted to
cut loose and run some more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She just wants to run all the time. She really does
love it from the bottom of her heart.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, that racer over there ran with me in the
Asahi Hai.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I need to talk to you about the next race.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She heard about me and came to challenge me in
the Asahi Hai.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She told me how hard she trained and how she
wouldn't lose.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: A rival...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, a rival! That's why the race was so fun!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But, for some reason, she seems down in the
dumps...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to drop some encouragement on
her, like a true rival should! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, please let me drop out of the next Spring
Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: Drop out? Are you serious?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I heard that Maruzensky is scheduled to run. I
know it's pathetic to say this, but...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: It's hard to run when... you know you can't win.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: I'm honestly surprised you would feel that way...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...But I understand. Let's find a race that better
suits you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: She's dropping out... because of me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That same power of Maruzensky's that makes fans
love her seems to leave a wholly different
impression on other runners.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Well, every race is important for us!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural to be careful when choosing the
races you run! Let's keep that in mind moving
forward, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm taking off! See you tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm taking off! See you tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she runs off, Maruzensky's stride somehow
doesn't seem as buoyant as it usually is...
